description_long: This is a tall, slender floor lamp with a round, weighted base and a long, narrow pole supporting a conical lampshade. The lampshade appears to be made of a pleated or textured fabric, with visible wear and a slightly tattered upper edge, giving it a vintage or distressed look. The pole and base are metallic, likely steel or iron, with a matte, weathered finish that suggests age and durability. The lamp's design is utilitarian but features subtle decorative elements, such as a rounded accent near the top of the pole. The overall color palette is muted, dominated by shades of gray and brown, which would allow it to blend into urban or industrial environments. The lamp is designed to stand on the floor and provide ambient lighting, likely using a single standard bulb beneath the shade.
description: A tall, vintage-style floor lamp with a pleated, worn fabric shade and a slender metal pole on a round base. The lamp has a muted, weathered appearance with subtle decorative accents.
description_view_0: Front view showing the tattered upper edge of the pleated fabric shade and the full height of the slender metal pole.
description_view_1: Slightly rotated view revealing more of the side of the shade and the rounded accent near the top of the pole.
description_view_2: Side view highlighting the conical shape of the shade and the even, vertical alignment of the pole.
description_view_3: Rear view with the pleated texture of the shade visible and the base fully aligned beneath the pole.
